meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code to build authority and attract high-paying clients.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by building a hyper-focused SEO SaaS landing page. Use Antigravity to scaffold the architecture and Claude Code to automate content generation. By demonstrating technical SEO proficiency on your own site, you prove your value to clients without needing years of legacy project history.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank portfolio is the greatest barrier to your freelancing career. You have the skills, but the market demands proof of concept before it grants you trust. Clients don't just want code; they want growth engines that rank on Google and convert visitors into leads.

This guide pivots your strategy from 'waiting for work' to 'building authority'. We will leverage Antigravity to structure a high-performance SaaS frontend and Claude Code to automate the SEO heavy lifting. You aren't just building a site; you are building the exact asset that lands your first high-ticket client.

steps.title: Define the SEO-First Architecture
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation for your SaaS site that prioritizes core web vitals and semantic HTML structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, SEO-optimized Next.js landing page boilerplate for a B2B SaaS product, including semantic header, footer, and a feature grid section with schema markup.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize a Next.js project with Tailwind CSS and SEO-friendly metadata configurations.'

steps.title: Automate Content Strategy
steps.description: Use AI to generate high-intent blog posts that target long-tail keywords relevant to your target client's industry.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a content generation script that takes a target keyword and generates a 1500-word authoritative blog post structure with H2/H3 tags and meta descriptions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a script using the Anthropic API to generate SEO-optimized content based on a provided keyword list.'

steps.title: Build Dynamic Meta Tags
steps.description: Implement a system that programmatically generates unique meta titles and descriptions for every page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility function for Next.js that dynamically updates page metadata based on content props and target keywords.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor the layout component to handle dynamic SEO metadata using Next.js 14+ metadata API.'

steps.title: Speed Optimization & Performance
steps.description: Ensure your site loads instantly to satisfy Google's PageSpeed metrics, a key ranking factor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the landing page for critical CSS and lazy-loading images to achieve a 95+ Google Lighthouse score.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Analyze the current build and suggest specific optimizations to improve Core Web Vitals.'

steps.title: Deploy & Track Authority
steps.description: Connect your project to analytics and indexing tools to monitor your progress in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4 tracking scripts into the main application wrapper.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Google Analytics and Search Console verification tags to the head of the document.'

pro_tips: Always use 'People Also Ask' sections from Google to dictate your blog post subheadings; it captures high-intent traffic.
Internal linking is your secret weapon: ensure every landing page links to at least three relevant blog posts.
Don't optimize for vanity metrics; focus on long-tail keywords where the competition is low but the intent is high.
Use Claude Code to create a site map generator that updates automatically whenever you add a new page.
Build a 'Case Study' page template as your first project; it acts as a portfolio piece even if it's a theoretical SaaS.
content.next_steps: Once your site is live, share the link in relevant subreddits and indie hacker communities to generate backlink authority, then start prospecting clients by showing them your own site as a live performance demo.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client to find you—build the infrastructure that makes them find you instead. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
